items.title: Mission
items.desc: A self-hostable URL shortener that small teams can stand up on their own domain in an afternoon. Bring-your-own-domain, real analytics, no third party tracking your users.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='arch:server' x='2' y='14' width='28' height='17'/><text x='16' y='40' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>your VPS</text><line x1='32' y1='22' x2='62' y2='22' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><polygon points='58,19 62,22 58,25' fill='var(--accent)'/><text x='47' y='19' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>302</text><use href='arch:browser' x='64' y='14' width='28' height='17'/><text x='78' y='40' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>go.team.co</text><text x='50' y='53' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>no third party in the path</text></svg>

items.title: Audience — who comes first?
items.desc: We can frame v1 around different primary users. The choice cascades into FR scope, default config, and dashboard density. Pick one to optimise FOR; the others still work, just second-class.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='wf:avatar-pair' x='8' y='8' width='26' height='26'/><use href='wf:avatar-single' x='40' y='8' width='20' height='26'/><use href='wf:avatar-circle' x='64' y='6' width='30' height='28'/><text x='21' y='42' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>team</text><text x='50' y='42' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>solo</text><text x='79' y='42' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink-2)' text-anchor='middle'>big-co</text><line x1='8' y1='48' x2='34' y2='48' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='36' y1='48' x2='94' y2='48' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><text x='50' y='56' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>v1 optimised for one; others still work</text></svg>

options.name: Small teams (3-50 people, internal short-links)
options.desc: Marketing + ops sharing internal redirects on a custom domain. Light analytics, occasional bursts.
options.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><use href='wf:avatar-pair' x='6' y='14' width='28' height='28'/><use href='wf:avatar-single' x='36' y='14' width='24' height='28'/><use href='wf:avatar-pair' x='62' y='14' width='28' height='28'/><text x='50' y='52' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>3-50 people</text></svg>
options.recommendation: OVR-1's lede already specifies "small teams"; framing v1 around them gives the dashboard a natural shape (per-link stats, recent activity feed) and keeps the $5-VPS hard constraint comfortable. Indie hackers and big-co marketing teams both still work fine downstream.

options.name: Indie hackers / single-operator
options.desc: One person running their own go-link service. Lowest analytics needs; values zero ops; appreciates the binary-and-config simplicity.

options.name: Big-company marketing teams
options.desc: More user roles, more audit, more granular analytics. Compatible with everything else; pulls the scope in a different direction.

items.title: Hard constraints
items.desc: One static binary. One config file. Must run on a $5/month VPS with 1 GB RAM. No SaaS dependencies for the redirect path — even if every other service is down, slugs still resolve.
items.art: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 60' style='width:90%;height:auto'><rect x='6' y='10' width='38' height='40' fill='none' stroke='var(--ink-2)' stroke-width='0.8'/><text x='25' y='22' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='5' fill='var(--ink)' text-anchor='middle'>clipsi</text><text x='25' y='30' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>(1 binary)</text><text x='25' y='40' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4.5' fill='var(--ink)' text-anchor='middle'>clipsi.toml</text><text x='25' y='46' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>(1 config)</text><line x1='48' y1='30' x2='58' y2='30' stroke='var(--ink-3)' stroke-width='0.6' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><rect x='60' y='14' width='34' height='32' fill='none' stroke='var(--accent)' stroke-width='1.2'/><text x='77' y='25' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='6.5' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>$5</text><text x='77' y='34' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--accent)' text-anchor='middle'>VPS</text><text x='77' y='41' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='3.8' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>1 GB RAM</text><text x='50' y='56' font-family='IBM Plex Mono' font-size='4' fill='var(--ink-3)' text-anchor='middle'>redirect path: zero SaaS deps</text></svg>
